difference: raws shows a compact operation list; AWS CLI shows full man-page style help with descriptions, NAME, DESCRIPTION sections. Both list the same operations.
raws sends request to API and gets server-side ValidationException (exit 254); AWS CLI validates client-side with ParamValidation error listing required args (exit 252). Both recognize the command.

raws sends request to API and gets server-side ValidationException (Member must not be null); AWS CLI validates client-side with ParamValidation (--pipeline required). Both recognize the command.
